name: Muslin Swaddle Blankets 3pk - Cloud Island™ Two by Two Animals
description:
Stock up on baby basics with this 3-Pack of Muslin Swaddle Blankets from cloud island™. This pack includes three square swaddle blankets — one in a solid dark gray hue, one in a light gray hue with white polka-dot print, and one with cute prints of animals lined up in pairs over a white background — to help add a touch of sweet style to your little one's nursery. Made from 100% cotton, these muslin swaddle blankets feel soft against baby's skin and offer cozy comfort, and they're machine washable to make cleaning and maintenance a breeze. Great for swaddling that leads to deep sleep, these versatile blankets can also be used as stroller covers, burp cloths and more.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
